best_chunk: Special Events Disabilities, Representation, and Film 2026 In celebration of the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA), the history-making civil rights law introduced in July 1990, the Academy Museum presents a day of short films, tours, and a live performance, all to bring awareness to disability, representation, and accessibility in Film. The program is free with your general admission ticket. Access to the screening, tours, and performance is included.
